compounds.frequency: daily, with occasional intramuscular dosing in evening

benefits.description: pain relief in left shoulder, good results when dosed in morning and intramuscularly in evening if pain returns

protocol_notes: Started with 3 intramuscular injections directly into left shoulder muscle, then switched to subcutaneous dosing. Doses 0.5mg in morning, and if pain starts in evening, administers 0.25mg intramuscularly to shoulder.
